description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a Windows binary using cx_freeze on release publication. The workflow should have two jobs: build_executable and build_installer. The first job should run on windows-latest, check out the repository, set up Python 3.9, install dependencies and cx-freeze, build the executable, and upload it as an artifact. The second job should also run on windows-latest, wait for the first job to complete, download the executable artifact, install NSIS, build an installer, and upload it as another artifact.
